MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jennifer R. Snyder, Esq. of the L/O of Jennifer R. Snyder, Tel. 510.825.3822, for defendants and moving party;
Claudia Center, Esq. of Legal Aid Society, Tel. 415.864.8848, for plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY and SURETEC INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is denied in its entirety. The First Amended Complaint is not barred by the statute of limitations and all causes of action contained therein are properly pled. One order signed for both motions. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976

Jennifer R. Snyder, Esq. of the L/O of Jennifer R. Snyder, Tel. 510.825.3822, for defendants and moving party;
Claudia Center, Esq. of Legal Aid Society, Tel. 415.864.8848, for plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendants American Contractors Indemnity Company and Suretec Insurance Company's Supplemental Demurrer To Plaintiffs' Complaint Or Amended Complaint is overruled in its entirety. The First Amended Complaint is not barred by the statute of limitations and all causes of action contained therein are properly pled. One order signed for both motions. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
